Part.Source: Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData' UnnamedTable3.Height = 5 UnnamedTable4.Height = 5 &EmpCod.Visible = False GridMotorista.Rows = Page.Rows GridReboque.Rows = Page.Rows GridVeiculo.Rows = Page.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridMotorista.Load For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFeMotCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDFeCod &gridMDFeMotCod = MDFeMotCod &gridMDFeMotCpf = MDFeMotCpf &gridMDFeMotNom = MDFeMotNom /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &DelMoto = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ load EndFor EndEvent Event GridReboque.Load For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFeRebCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDFeCod &gridMDFeRebCap =MDFeRebCap &gridMDFeRebCapM3 =MDFeRebCapM3 &gridMDFeRebCod =MDFeRebCod &gridMDFeRebPla =MDFeRebPla &gridMDfeRebRen =MDfeRebRen &gridMDFeRebTar =MDFeRebTar &gridMDFeRebTipCar =MDFeRebTipCar &gridMDFERebTipRod =MDFERebTipRod &gridMDFeRebUF =MDFeRebUF &gridMDFeRebRNTRC = MDFeRebRNTRC /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &RemoveReboque = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Load EndFor EndEvent Event GridVeiculo.Load For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFeVeiCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDFeCod &gridMDFeVeiCap = MDFeVeiCap &gridMDFeVeiCapM3 = MDFeVeiCapM3 &gridMDFeVeiCod = MDFeVeiCod &gridMDFeVeiPla = MDFeVeiPla &gridMDFeVeiRen = MDFeVeiRen &gridMDFeVeiTar = MDFeVeiTar &gridMDFeVeiTipCar = MDFeVeiTipCar &gridMDFeVeiTipRod = MDFeVeiTipRod &gridMDFeVeiUF = MDFeVeiUF &gridMDFeVeiRNTRC = MDFeVeiRNTRC /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &Eliminar = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Load EndFOr EndEvent Event Enter 8 If 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' WPMDFe01(!'Transporte', !'Modal', false) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else If not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' Do Case Case &WizardData.Transporte.GridMotorista.Count < 1 or &WizardData.Transporte.GridMotorista.Count > 10 Msg('ATENÇÃO! É preciso conter no mínimo 1 e no máximo 10 motorista. Verifique!') Case &WizardData.Transporte.GridVeiculo.Count < 1 or &WizardData.Transporte.GridVeiculo.Count > 1 Msg('ATENÇÃO! É preciso conter somente 1 veículo de transporte. Verifique!') Case &WizardData.Transporte.GridReboque.Count > 3 Msg('ATENÇÃO! É preciso conter no máximo 3 reboque. Verifique!') Otherwise WPMDFe01(!'Transporte', !'Modal', false) EndCase EndIf EndIf EndEvent Event 'WizardPrevious' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPMDFe01(!'Transporte', !'Percurso', true) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAddMOtorista' if not &MDFeMotNom.IsEmpty() ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&MDFeMotCpf, &erroc, 'N') if &erroc = 0 MDFE_Motorista.Call('ADD', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod, 0, &MDFeMotCpf, &MDFeMotNom) &PadObs = &MDFeMotCpf &PadObs += &MDFeMotNom PadraoUsuario.Call('G', 'MOTORISTA_MDFE', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &MDFeMotCpf.SetEmpty() &MDFeMotNom.SetEmpty() gridMotorista.Refresh() Else msg('Cpf inválido!') EndIF EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoaddReboque' FormataPLACA.Call(&EmpCod, &MDFeRebPla, &MDFeRebPla) MDFe_Reboque.Call('ADD', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod, 0, &MDFeRebPla) &PadObs = &MDFeRebPla PadraoUsuario.Call('G', 'REBOQUE_MDFE', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &MDFeRebPla.SetEmpty() gridReboque.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoNovoReboque' &IsGetPlacaReboque = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ NovoReboque_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Refresh EndEvent Event NovoReboque_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpNovoCadastroVeiculo.Create(TrnMode.Insert, &EmpCod, 0, &MDFeRebPla) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'Doaddveiculo' FormataPLACA.Call(&EmpCod, &MDFeVeiPla, &MDFeVeiPla) MDFe_Veiculo.Call('ADD', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod, 0, &MDFeVeiPla) &PadObs = &MDFeVeiPla PadraoUsuario.Call('G', 'VEICULO_MDFE', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &MDFeVeiPla.SetEmpty() gridVeiculo.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoNovoTracao' &IsGetPlacaTracao = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ NovoTracao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Refresh EndEvent Event NovoTracao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpNovoCadastroVeiculo.Create(TrnMode.Insert, &EmpCod, 0, &MDFeVeiPla) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData' If 1 = 2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &MDFeMotNom = &WizardData.Transporte.MDFeMotNom &MDFeMotCpf = &WizardData.Transporte.MDFeMotCpf &MDFeRebPla = &WizardData.Transporte.MDFeRebPla &MDFeVeiPla = &WizardData.Transporte.MDFeVeiPla &EmpCod = &WizardData.Transporte.EmpCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod &FilCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod &MDFeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MdfeCod PadraoUsuario.Call('L', 'VEICULO_MDFE', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) If not &PadObs.Trim().IsEmpty() &MDFeVeiPla = substr(&PadObs,1,8) EndIf PadraoUsuario.Call('L', 'REBOQUE_MDFE', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) If not &PadObs.Trim().IsEmpty() &MDFeRebPla = substr(&PadObs,1,8) EndIf PadraoUsuario.Call('L', 'MOTORISTA_MDFE', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) If not &PadObs.Trim().IsEmpty() &MDFeMotCpf = substr(&PadObs,1,14) &MDFeMotNom = substr(&PadObs,15,100) EndIf EndIf if &MDFeCod.IsEmpty() wwMdfe.Link() Endif EndSub Sub 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.Transporte.MDFeMotNom = &MDFeMotNom &WizardData.Transporte.MDFeMotCpf = &MDFeMotCpf &WizardData.Transporte.MDFeRebPla = &MDFeRebPla &WizardData.Transporte.MDFeVeiPla = &MDFeVeiPla &WizardData.Transporte.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Transporte.GridMotorista.Clear() For Each Line in GridMotorista &GridMotoristaItem = new() &GridMotoristaItem.gridMDFeMotCod = &gridMDFeMotCod &GridMotoristaItem.gridMDFeMotCpf = &gridMDFeMotCpf &GridMotoristaItem.gridMDFeMotNom = &gridMDFeMotNom &WizardData.Transporte.GridMotorista.Add(&GridMotoristaItem) EndFor &WizardData.Transporte.GridReboque.Clear() For Each Line in GridReboque &GridReboqueItem = new() &GridReboqueItem.gridMDFeRebPla = &gridMDFeRebPla &GridReboqueItem.gridMDFeRebUF = &gridMDFeRebUF &GridReboqueItem.gridMDfeRebRen = &gridMDfeRebRen &GridReboqueItem.gridMDFeRebCod = &gridMDFeRebCod &GridReboqueItem.gridMDFeRebTipCar = &gridMDFeRebTipCar &GridReboqueItem.gridMDFERebTipRod = &gridMDFERebTipRod &GridReboqueItem.gridMDFeRebCap = &gridMDFeRebCap &GridReboqueItem.gridMDFeRebTar = &gridMDFeRebTar &GridReboqueItem.gridMDFeRebCapM3 = &gridMDFeRebCapM3 &GridReboqueItem.gridMDFeRebRNTRC = &gridMDFeRebRNTRC &WizardData.Transporte.GridReboque.Add(&GridReboqueItem) EndFor &WizardData.Transporte.GridVeiculo.Clear() For Each Line in GridVeiculo &GridVeiculoItem = new() &GridVeiculoItem.gridMDFeVeiPla = &gridMDFeVeiPla &GridVeiculoItem.gridMDFeVeiUF = &gridMDFeVeiUF &GridVeiculoItem.gridMDFeVeiCod = &gridMDFeVeiCod &GridVeiculoItem.gridMDFeVeiRen = &gridMDFeVeiRen &GridVeiculoItem.gridMDFeVeiTipCar = &gridMDFeVeiTipCar &GridVeiculoItem.gridMDFeVeiTipRod = &gridMDFeVeiTipRod &GridVeiculoItem.gridMDFeVeiCap = &gridMDFeVeiCap &GridVeiculoItem.gridMDFeVeiTar = &gridMDFeVeiTar &GridVeiculoItem.gridMDFeVeiCapM3 = &gridMDFeVeiCapM3 &GridVeiculoItem.gridMDFeVeiRNTRC = &gridMDFeVeiRNTRC &WizardData.Transporte.GridVeiculo.Add(&GridVeiculoItem) EndFor &WizardData.Modal.EmpCod = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.EmpCod &WizardData.Modal.FilCpj = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.FilCpj &WizardData.Modal.MDFeMaxCiot = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MDFeMaxCiot &WizardData.Modal.FilAmbEms = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.FilAmbEms &WizardData.Modal.MDFeCIOT = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MDFeCIOT &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtParVlr = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtParVlr &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtParVct = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtParVct &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtChvPix = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtChvPix &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtBanAge = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtBanAge &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtBanCod = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtBanCod &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrPed = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrPed &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrTxa = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrTxa &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrBan = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrBan &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrOut = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrOut &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrFre = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrFre &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrAdi = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtVlrAdi &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtForPgt = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtForPgt &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtDes = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtDes &WizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtTot = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePgtFrtTot &WizardData.Modal.MdfeInfPagFrtRaz = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfeInfPagFrtRaz &WizardData.Modal.MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj &WizardData.Modal.MDFeTomFrt = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MDFeTomFrt &WizardData.Modal.MdfeCatComVei = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfeCatComVei &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedTip = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePedTip &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedVlr = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePedVlr &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedResPag = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePedResPag &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedNroCom = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePedNroCom &WizardData.Modal.MdfePedCnpjFor = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePedCnpjFor &WizardData.Modal.MdfeConRaz = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfeConRaz &WizardData.Modal.MdfeConCnpj = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfeConCnpj &WizardData.Modal.MDFePgtFrt = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MDFePgtFrt &WizardData.Modal.MdfePosVale = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MdfePosVale &WizardData.Modal.MDFeRNTRC = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.MDFeRNTRC &WizardData.Modal.GridParcela.Clear() &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &DelMoto.Click MDFE_Motorista.Call('DEL', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod, &gridMDFeMotCod, '', '') gridMotorista.Refresh() EndEvent Event &RemoveReboque.Click MDFe_Reboque.Call('DEL', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod, &gridMDFeRebCod, '') gridReboque.Refresh() EndEvent Event &Eliminar.Click MDFe_Veiculo.Call('DEL', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod, &gridMDFeVEiCod, '') gridVeiculo.Refresh() EndEvent Event &MDFeMotCpf.IsValid Do 'Motorista' EndEvent Event Refresh If &IsGetPlacaTracao = True &MDFeVeiPla.FromString(&WebSession.Get(!"PlacaVeiculo")) &WebSession.Remove(!"PlacaVeiculo") EndIf &IsGetPlacaTracao = False If &IsGetPlacaReboque = True &MDFeRebPla.FromString(&WebSession.Get(!"PlacaVeiculo")) &WebSession.Remove(!"PlacaVeiculo") EndIf &IsGetPlacaReboque = False EndEvent Sub 'Motorista' If not &MDFeMotCpf.Trim().IsEmpty() ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&MDFeMotCpf, &erroc, 'N') For each order EmpCod,PesCpf Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCpf = &MDFeMotCpf &MDFeMotNom = PesRaz Exit EndFor EndIf EndSub
